title: enneastemon ochroleucus var. keniensis
intro: Enneastemon ochroleucus var. keniensis, also known as the Kenyan yellow-leaf enneastemon, is a plant species belonging to the family Annonaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional African medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The plant has been reported to possess antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and enhancing immune function. Enneastemon ochroleucus var. keniensis is often prepared as a herbal tea or decoction, and its roots are used in traditional remedies.
